title: Ritual
venue: Jerusalem Artists' House — curated by Hadas Glazer
description: A solo exhibition gathering recent paintings in which bodies, nature and spirituality meet in ritual scenes. Faceless figures assemble around offerings within lush botanical landscapes, building a personal mythology of body, belonging and transcendence.

title: In Full Bloom
venue: Herzl House — curated by Yahel Nevo
description: A group exhibition exploring growth, nature and the human figure.

title: Nature of Man
description: A solo exhibition presenting the figure within nature — between the real and the visionary.
